title: config module: strict decoding (deny_unknown_fields), allowed-roots fail-closed, token-env-only
action: Config struct with serde deny_unknown_fields (unknown key = error naming key), empty allowed-roots = hard startup error (never allow-all), tokens (web session token, github token, telegram token) read ONLY from env/secret-file never a config field. Validate collects all errors. Bind address defaults to tailnet-friendly. Tests: unknown key rejected, empty allowlist rejected, token-in-config rejected.

truths: unknown config key is a named error
prohibitions: No silent defaulting of unknown keys
No token fields in the config struct

verify: cargo test --quiet config && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Strict config decoding (deny_unknown_fields → named error), empty allowed_roots fails closed, tokens env-only (no field to receive them), errors collected together. Committed 87cee99.
trace.verification_evidence:
config tests pass:
- unknown_key_is_a_named_error (serde names the offending key)
- empty_allowed_roots_fails_closed + missing_allowed_roots_fails_closed
- token_field_is_rejected_no_such_field
- multiple_errors_collected
clippy -D warnings clean
trace.verify_output: config tests: unknown-key named error, empty allowlist fail-closed, token-in-config rejected; clippy clean
trace.verify_command: cargo test --quiet security config && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
